docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $676.37 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KHONDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KHONDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, KHONDA $601.37 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $666.37, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/23/11 TO KHONDA BROWN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KHONDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
